category_title: Distracted students using technology or showing physical disengagement
minimal_context: The student is working independently on a computer-based project assignment to create a company letterhead in an elective class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working independently on your computer-based project assignment to create a company letterhead.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I need some clarity on this assignment. What are the directions?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just read the prompt on the screen and see what you can do.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't get it. (Puts head on the desk)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to work on the project.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Lifts head, gets distracted, opens another website on the computer, and starts texting on a cell phone)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working independently on your computer-based project assignment to create a company letterhead.

STUDENT: I need some clarity on this assignment. What are the directions?

TUTOR: Just read the prompt on the screen and see what you can do.

STUDENT: I don't get it. (Puts head on the desk)

TUTOR: Keep trying to work on the project.

STUDENT: (Lifts head, gets distracted, opens another website on the computer, and starts texting on a cell phone)
